name: bow-skills
description: Company-wide Claude Code skills. 'bow-core' covers the spec→ship development lifecycle for any project; project-specific plugins (e.g. 'octopus') layer on top.

plugins.name: bow-core
plugins.description: Project-agnostic engineering skills: spec, planning, TDD, debugging, simplification, app-layer security, and Stripe integration helpers. Works on any codebase.

plugins.name: octopus
plugins.description: Project-specific skills for the Octopus app / monorepo: the Octopus commit pipeline, Flutter MVVM scaffolding, and Supabase security review. Install only when working on Octopus.
